reviews.comment:
Pasé a cargar nafta el 23/03/2025, me atendió un playero que evidentemente no estaba en su mejor día o le faltan algunas luces.
El playero estaba distraído mientras cargaba nafta, y derramó un par de litros los cuales me cobró aduciendo que el problema era mi auto.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to fill up on March 23, 2025. The attendant served me, and he was clearly having an off day or perhaps he was a bit dim.
The attendant was distracted while pumping gas and spilled a couple of liters, which he then charged me for, claiming the problem was with my car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJOHZYYzJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los despachantes muy lentos en la atención y se encierran en su sala de descanso y por mas que este congestionado el servicio no salen a atender

(Translated by Google)
The dispatchers are very slow to serve customers and they lock themselves in their break room, and no matter how busy the service is, they don't come out to help.
